mapper.update: UPDATE `petlog`.address SET address_primary = #{addressPrimary}, address_secondary = #{addressSecondary}, lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng}, postal_code = #{postalCode} WHERE address_id = #{addressId}
mapper.select: SELECT name, species, birth_date AS birthDate, gender, weight, body_type AS bodyType, image_url AS imageUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.pets WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT address_id AS addressId, user_id AS userId, address_type AS addressType, postal_code AS postalCode, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, lat AS lat, lng AS lng FROM `petlog`.`address` WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.pet_id AS petId, p.user_id AS userId, p.name AS name, p.species AS species, p.birth_date AS birthDate, p.gender AS gender, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.introduction AS introduction, a.lat AS lat, a.lng AS lng,
CASE WHEN f.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS isFollowing,
( 6371 * acos( LEAST(1.0, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(a.lat)) * cos(radians(a.lng) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(a.lat)) ) ) ) AS distanceKm
FROM petlog.pets p JOIN petlog.address a ON p.user_id = a.user_id
LEFT JOIN petlog.follows f ON f.following_user_id = #{userId} AND f.followed_user_id = p.user_id
WHERE p.user_id != #{userId} AND a.address_type = 'map' AND a.lat IS NOT NULL AND a.lng IS NOT NULL AND ( 6371 * acos( LEAST(1.0, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(a.lat)) * cos(radians(a.lng) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(a.lat)) ) ) ) <=#{radiusKm}
ORDER BY distanceKm ASC

SELECT address_id AS addressId, user_id AS userId, address_type AS addressType, postal_code AS postalCode, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, lat AS lat, lng AS lng FROM `petlog`.`address` WHERE user_id != #{excludeUserId} AND address_type = 'map'

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, p.image_url AS imageUrl, (6371 * acos(LEAST(1.0, GREATEST(-1.0, cos(radians(#{myLat})) * cos(radians(a.lat)) * cos(radians(a.lng) - radians(#{myLng})) + sin(radians(#{myLat})) * sin(radians(a.lat)) )))) AS distance, p.species AS species, p.name AS petName, p.gender AS gender, p.birth_date AS birthDate, p.introduction AS introduction, false AS isFollowing FROM `petlog`.personal_user u JOIN `petlog`.address a ON u.user_id = a.user_id LEFT JOIN `petlog`.pets p ON u.user_id = p.user_id AND p.is_primary = 1 WHERE u.user_id != #{userId} AND a.lat != 0 HAVING distance <= #{radiusKm} ORDER BY distance ASC
